decision-tree.root-question: Does the call need (a) external action via tools, (b) strict-schema JSON extraction, or (c) free-form text?

branch.question: Does the pipeline depend on a tool result downstream?

branch.conclusion: Use `tool_choice="required"`. If only one tool can produce the result, pin by name. Run coherence_check before dispatch.
Use `tool_choice="auto"`. Still enforce message-order discipline on any tool result.

branch.question: Is the model gpt-4o or newer?

branch.conclusion: Use `client.beta.chat.completions.parse(response_format=PydanticModel)`. Null-check refusal before reading parsed.
Use `response_format={"type":"json_object"}` + manual Pydantic validation in the wrapper.
Use plain Chat Completions (see [[openai-chat-completions]]). No tools, no parse.

example.p: "Extract name+age from this paragraph" → need=extraction, model=gpt-4o → parse with `class Person(BaseModel)`. Conclusion r2-parse-on-gpt4o-only.
